title: 1.21.6 Music Backport
description: backports v1.21.6 (Chase The Skies) menu and in game music to older versions of Minecraft
body:
This Resource Pack is simple, it backports the Chase The Skies Music to Older Versions Of Minecraft. Designed To be used with minecraft versions below 1.21.6.
Has a random chance to play alongside the standard vanilla tracks, including the title screen.

Includes
- Lily Pad - Amos Roddy
- Below And Above - Amos Roddy
- Broken Clocks - Amos Roddy
- Fireflies - Amos Roddy
- O's Piano - Amos Roddy

This Resource Pack Also Includes Lang Files (en_us), For Some Music Player Mods That Support It Like Simple Music Control.
